name: Multi-Factor Long-Short Equity (Quality + Value + Momentum)
description: Combines multiple academic risk factors into a single composite score per stock. Quality (profitability, earnings stability), Value (P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA), and Momentum (12-1 return) are blended with dynamic weights. Long high-scoring stocks, short low-scoring. Rebalance monthly.
core_logic: composite_score(i) = w_mom * momentum_score + w_val * value_score + w_qual * quality_score. All scores normalized to z-scores within sector. Top/bottom 20% → long/short.
cons: Growth vs value rotation can hurt combined signal
key_papers: Asness et al Value and Momentum Everywhere (2013)
signal_buy: Composite factor score > 80th percentile in sector
signal_sell: Composite factor score < 20th percentile in sector
